Payload.title: Payload
Payload.description: An encrypted payload to be shared via link.

authorUID.description: The UID of the user who created the payload.

createdAt.description: The time the payload was created.

ciphertext.description: The base64 encoded encrypted message payload.

sender.description: The name of the user who sent the message.

timestamp.description: The time the message was sent.

ChatParticipant.title: ChatParticipant
ChatParticipant.description: A participant in a chat room.

name.description: The display name of the participant.

lastActive.description: The last active timestamp of the participant.

/chatRooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores encrypted chat messages for a specific room.

/chatRooms/{roomId}/participants/{partic.description: Stores active participants in a chat room.
